title: senecio cumingii var. cumingii
intro: Senecio cumingii var. cumingii, a type of shrub native to the Philippines, is a plant species known for its medicinal properties and uses. This plant, also known as "Tawa-tawa," is traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including liver and lung diseases, due to its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Senecio cumingii var. cumingii include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
